title: Inspect and explain a classification outcome
preconditions: The referenced evaluation outcome exists and its source transaction, rule, normalization, category, and snapshot identifiers are available.
postconditions: The owner can reproduce why the outcome occurred without exposing unrelated transaction data or performing any mutation.
main_flow: CLASSIFY returns the outcome type; canonical fields actually inspected; normalization and rule versions; matched rule identifiers and predicates; selected category identifier when present; conflict or no-suggestion reason; staleness state; and the next safe action.
alt_flows: Return stable not-found when the evaluation or transaction reference is unknown.
Return stale with invalidating state when the underlying transaction, category, rule, normalization, or snapshot changed.
Do not reconstruct evidence from current state when the historical evidence is unavailable.
metadata: {"depth_tier":2,"primary_actor":"P1","trigger":"The owner or AI Agent Host requests the reason for a suggestion, no-suggestion, conflict, or stale result.","status":"draft"}
